ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., 10000+ Employees) */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the company's CEO */,
  "ceo_approval_rating" REAL /* CEO's approval rating (1-5) */,
  "glassdoor_score" REAL /* Overall Glassdoor score (1-5) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_title" TEXT /* Title of the employee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Employee status (e.g., Current Employee, Former Employee) */,
  "years_at_company" TEXT /* Number of years the employee has been with the company */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Employee's performance rating (1-5) */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_overall" REAL /* Overall rating of the company (1-5) */,
  "rating_balance" REAL /* Work-life balance rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_culture" REAL /* Culture and values rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_career" REAL /* Career opportunities rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_comp" REAL /* Compensation and benefits rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_mgmt" REAL /* Senior management rating (1-5) */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis score of the ratings (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Employee engagement score (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, HR, Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp of the last update to the company's information

Number of years the employee has been with the company
Date the employee left the company (if applicable)
